ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of energy consumption */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of energy consumption */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of energy consumption */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where energy was consumed */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector consuming energy */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the energy consumption */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the energy source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sector */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sector is active */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the energy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the energy source */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the energy source is active */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the energy source is renewable */,
  "carbon_intensity" REAL /* Carbon intensity of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the state is active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumption record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the consumption record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the consumption record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for security and analytics */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_consumption_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumption_id") REFERENCES energy_consumption ("consumption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_consumption" (
  "yearly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly consumption record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of energy consumption */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where energy was consumed */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector consuming energy */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "total_consumption" REAL /* Total energy consumed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost associated with the energy consumption */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Average unit price of the energy source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yearly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_consumption_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_consumption_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_consumption_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_consumption" (
  "monthly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly consumption record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of energy consumption */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of energy consumption */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where energy was consumed */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector consuming energy */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "total_consumption" REAL /* Total energy consumed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost associated with the energy consumption */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Average unit price of the energy source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monthly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_consumption_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_consumption_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_consumption_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)
